gaps.description: Agent loop: ask() runs multi-round loop, terminates on stopReason !== 'tool_use' (src/ask.ts)
search tool — web search via Tavily/Serper, returns sources (src/tools/search.ts)
code_exec — JS via quickjs-emscripten sandbox, browser-compatible (src/tools/code.ts)
code_exec — Python via Pyodide (browser) / python3 subprocess (Node) (src/tools/code.ts)
code_exec — auto-language detection for JS vs Python (src/tools/code.ts)
code_exec — filesystem API injection (fs object for JS, open() for Python) backed by AgenticFileSystem (src/tools/code.ts)
file_read / file_write — file I/O via AgenticFileSystem, browser-compatible (src/tools/file.ts)

PRD says shell_exec is 'browser/Node compatible' but implementation is Node-only — returns 'shell_exec not available in browser' error. Tool definition only registered when isNodeEnv() returns true (src/tools/shell.ts, src/ask.ts:137). PRD should correct to 'Node.js only'.
Provider config: provider ('anthropic'|'openai'|'custom'), apiKey, model, baseUrl, customProvider, systemPrompt (src/providers/)
AgenticResult shape: answer, sources, images, codeResults, files, toolCalls, usage, shellResults (src/types.ts)
apiKey required for anthropic/openai, throws before network call (src/providers/provider.ts)
provider='custom' invokes customProvider hook, skips apiKey validation (src/providers/provider.ts)
systemPrompt passed to provider system field on every round (src/ask.ts)
AgenticResult.images populated from tool results (src/ask.ts, src/tools/search.ts)
